label: Precipitation (annual)
na_meaning: NA unless all 12 distinct calendar months have valid precipitation; partial-year totals are never summed.

label: Mean temperature
na_meaning: NA unless all 12 distinct calendar months have valid temperature, or when the within-site MAD outlier filter NA'd a corrupted-sensor year.

label: Winter rain (Oct–Mar)
na_meaning: NA unless all 6 Oct-Mar months are present.

label: Monsoon rain (Jul–Sep)
na_meaning: NA when any of the 3 Jul-Sep months is missing.

label: Spring temperature
na_meaning: NA unless all 3 Mar-May months are present, or when within-site MAD outlier QC flags an implausible spring-temperature year.

label: Green-up onset index
na_meaning: DOY-anchored composition-adjusted onset index; NA unless >=2 recurrent species contribute, each with >=3 left-censor-screened individuals (therefore >=6 contributors). Exclusion of left-censored records is not interval-censored modeling and can select contributors by visit timing/cadence. It is not an observed pooled-median onset date. retrospective full-snapshot standardization: species recurrence, incidence connectivity, primary species references, and additive species/year effects are refit over the current source snapshot; future refreshes can revise historical index values; source commits and the bundle fingerprint preserve exact lineage
n_gate: >=2 recurrent species/yr and >=3 individuals/species-year (therefore >=6 contributors); species eligible in >=3 years

label: Opportunistic observed-month fruiting peak
na_meaning: Opportunistic maximum among observed months with >=5 individuals, not a fixed-season annual estimate. NA when no month qualifies; opportunity varies and is exposed in fruiting_n_eligible_months.
n_gate: context only; >=5 individuals in each eligible observed month; no fixed annual coverage gate

label: Plant richness
na_meaning: NA when the plant-diversity bundle has no plot data that year.

label: Plant diversity (q1)
na_meaning: Effective species (exp-Shannon Hill number); NA when fewer than 2 cover-scored species that year.

label: Plant diversity (q2)
na_meaning: Effective species (inverse-Simpson Hill number); NA when fewer than 2 cover-scored species that year.

label: Introduced plant cover
na_meaning: NA when cover is unscored that year; only nativeStatusCode='I' counts as introduced ('NI' remains unknown).

label: Small-mammal catch rate
na_meaning: NA when no reviewed trapping effort is recorded that year. Canonical trap-event duplicates must match the locked multi-capture or exact source-documented double-trap rules; unreviewed ambiguity aborts the build.

label: Small mammals (indiv.)
na_meaning: Zero when trapping rows exist but no tagged individual is captured; NA when no trapping records exist that year.
n_gate: trapping records present; zero tags allowed

label: Bird detection index
na_meaning: NA when no observed point-count occasion that year. Flyovers are excluded. Annual source effort omits zero-detection visits, so this remains a descriptive lower-denominator index and carries no prior.

label: Bird richness
na_meaning: NA when no observed point-count detection occasion exists; zero when observed rows contain only excluded flyovers/non-species records.

label: Mosquito activity
na_meaning: NA when no CO2 trap effort that year.

label: Mosquito richness
na_meaning: Zero when recorded effort has no target catch; NA when neither effort nor identified mosquito catch is available.

label: Culex share (WNV group)
na_meaning: NA when the catch is zero or unidentified to the Culex group.

label: Ground-beetle activity
na_meaning: NA when no catch-bearing pitfall event effort is available that year; source bundles omit zero-catch events, so the denominator is incomplete. Activity-density (per 100 recorded trap-nights), not abundance.

label: Ground-beetle richness
na_meaning: Species-level carabids only (taxonRank species/subspecies/speciesGroup); genus/family IDs excluded. NA when no identified carabid catch that year.

label: Valid annual-temperature months
na_meaning: NA when no climate rows exist for the site-year; otherwise counts distinct valid calendar months after range QC.

label: Valid annual-precipitation months
na_meaning: NA when no climate rows exist for the site-year; otherwise counts distinct valid calendar months after range QC.

label: Valid winter-rain months
na_meaning: NA when no Oct-Mar water-year rows exist; otherwise counts valid months in the six-month window.

label: Valid monsoon-rain months
na_meaning: NA when no Jul-Sep rows exist; otherwise counts valid months in the three-month window.

label: Valid spring-temperature months
na_meaning: NA when no Mar-May rows exist; otherwise counts valid months in the three-month window.

label: Eligible observed fruiting months
na_meaning: Zero when monthly rows exist but none has finite fruiting status supported by >=5 individuals; counts observed opportunities, not fixed seasonal coverage.

label: Individuals behind observed-month fruiting peak
na_meaning: NA when no fruiting month qualifies; otherwise the minimum observed-individual count among months tied at the annual observed maximum.

label: Candidate green-up individual-years
na_meaning: NA when no finite earliest green-up record exists that year. Includes left-censored first-visit-already-yes records before exclusions.
n_gate: audit total; must equal censored + taxon-excluded + contributors

label: Left-censored green-up records
na_meaning: NA when no candidate green-up record exists that year; otherwise counts earliest individual-year records whose first visit was already yes and therefore supplies only an upper bound. Exclusion is a screen, not interval-censored modeling, and may select contributors by visit timing/cadence.
n_gate: excluded from greenup_doy; audit censor burden

label: Composition/support-excluded green-up records
na_meaning: NA when no candidate record exists; otherwise counts uncensored individual-years excluded because taxon identity is unresolved, species-year n<3, species recurs in <3 eligible years, or the species belongs to a disconnected incidence component not selected for the site index.

label: Individuals supporting green-up index
na_meaning: NA when no candidate record exists; zero when candidates exist but none survives censoring/composition gates; otherwise final non-left-censored contributors in the selected connected recurrent-species panel.
n_gate: >=2 species x >=3 individuals makes the emitted minimum 6

label: Species supporting green-up index
na_meaning: NA when no candidate record exists; zero when none is eligible; otherwise recurrent resolved species contributing to the selected connected panel that year.

label: Green-up site reference anchor
na_meaning: NA when the site has no eligible connected recurrent-species panel; otherwise the fixed equal-species median baseline repeated across site-years. It anchors anomalies for display and is not an observed annual onset.

label: Green-up additive-model sensitivity
na_meaning: NA on exactly the same site-years as greenup_doy. Alternate unweighted species + year OLS standardization on the same eligible connected cells, evaluated over every retained species x year and summarized by the fixed-species median. Values for missing species-years are additive-model extrapolations; neither this nor the median-centered primary estimator is uniquely true. retrospective full-snapshot standardization: species recurrence, incidence connectivity, primary species references, and additive species/year effects are refit over the current source snapshot; future refreshes can revise historical index values; source commits and the bundle fingerprint preserve exact lineage
n_gate: same >=2-species/current-support gate as greenup_doy; sensitivity only, not a ladder signal

label: Median contributor onset interval width
na_meaning: NA when no final uncensored contributor survives the resolved/recurrent-species and connected-panel screens that year. Otherwise the median last-no to first-yes interval width across final contributors; tied earliest phases use the widest tied interval.
n_gate: audit only; values >14 days trigger a QC review flag; finite exactly when greenup_n_individuals > 0

label: 90th-percentile contributor onset interval width
na_meaning: NA when no final contributor survives. Otherwise the type-7 90th percentile of last-no to first-yes interval widths across final contributors; it is a cadence audit, not an annual-index confidence interval.
n_gate: audit only; finite exactly when greenup_n_individuals > 0

label: Maximum contributor onset interval width
na_meaning: NA when no final contributor survives. Otherwise the widest last-no to first-yes interval among final contributors; values >30 days trigger a QC review flag.
n_gate: audit only; finite exactly when greenup_n_individuals > 0

label: Sampled plant plots
na_meaning: NA when the plant bundle has no species observations that year.

label: Sampled plant units
na_meaning: NA when the plant bundle has no species observations that year; nested scale and bout are part of the key.

label: Cover with unresolved native status
na_meaning: NA when total scored cover is zero; includes NI, UNK, blank, and any code other than N or I.

label: Small-mammal trap effort
na_meaning: NA when no trap records exist. A-J x 1-10 coordinates resolve physical events: reviewed status-4/5 multi-capture groups count once, while exactly two source-documented double-trap groups sum row weights. AX-JX, X1-X10, and XX placeholders remain row-level and can overstate effort when several rows came from one unknown trap; every unreviewed canonical duplicate aborts generation.

label: Small-mammal captures
na_meaning: NA when the mammal bundle has no rows that year; each nonblank tagID is one capture row.

label: Placeholder-coordinate mammal rows
na_meaning: NA when no mammal rows exist that year; otherwise the number of AX-JX, X1-X10, or XX source rows whose physical trap cannot be identified and whose effort therefore remains row-level.
n_gate: audit only; each row contributes its locked status weight

label: Resolved multi-capture trap events
na_meaning: NA when no mammal rows exist that year; otherwise canonical-coordinate duplicate groups carrying status 4 (optionally 5), all unique tagged animals, collapsed to one trap-night.
n_gate: audit only; exact reviewed structural rule

label: Source-documented double-trap events
na_meaning: NA when no mammal rows exist that year; otherwise canonical-coordinate two-row groups whose every remark contains the same one of two locked reviewed multi-trap markers; row effort is summed.
n_gate: audit only; exact reviewed remark rule

label: Observed bird point-count occasions
na_meaning: NA when the catch-only observation table has no detections that year; zero-detection visits are unavailable.

label: Non-flyover bird detections
na_meaning: NA when no observation rows exist that year; cluster sizes exclude detectionMethod=flyover.

label: Excluded flyover detections
na_meaning: NA when no observation rows exist that year; retained for audit but excluded from index and richness.

label: Mosquito CO2-trap effort
na_meaning: NA when effort_week is unavailable that year; includes attempted zero-catch deployments.

label: Whole-trap mosquito catch
na_meaning: Zero when positive recorded effort has no target catch; NA when neither effort nor catch is available.

label: Ground-beetle catch-event effort
na_meaning: NA when no catch-bearing event with effort exists; source bundles omit zero-catch events.

label: Ground-beetle catch
na_meaning: NA when the catch-only beetle bundle has no positive catch that year.
